description: Initial project structure: backend (FastAPI), frontend (React+Vite), docker-compose
Core configuration: settings, middleware, database models
Authentication API: register, login (JWT), user info endpoints
Workflows API: CRUD operations for workflow management
Agent templates API: built-in templates (ReAct, Plan-Execute, Multi-Agent)
Executions API: start, monitor, cancel workflow executions
Workflow executor using LangGraph: graph building, node execution
Frontend setup: React, Vite, ReactFlow, Ant Design
Login page with registration, auth store with Zustand
Visual workflow editor: ReactFlow canvas, node palette, save/load
Agent templates page: list, create custom templates
Executions page: list, status, logs, polling
